# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

apiVersion: configuration.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: ClusterAdmin
metadata:
  name: cluster-admin

---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: ControllerRevisions
metadata:
  name: default-controller-revision

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: ServiceProfile
metadata:
  name: httpbin-profile
spec:
  selector: app=httpbin
  networkPolicyPeers:
    - selector: app=httpbin

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: ServiceProfile
metadata:
  name: bookinfo-profile
spec:
  selector: app=bookinfo
  networkPolicyPeers:
    - selector: app=productpage

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: ServiceProfile
metadata:
  name: productpage-profile
spec:
  selector: app=productpage
  networkPolicyPeers:
    - selector: app=purchase

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: ServiceProfile
metadata:
  name: ratings-profile
spec:
  selector: app=ratings
  networkPolicyPeers:
    - selector: app=purchase

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: ServicePort
metadata:
  name: httpbin-port
spec:
  selector: app=httpbin
  number: 80

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: ServicePort
metadata:
  name: productpage-port
spec:
  selector: app=productpage
  number: 9080

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: bookinfo-policy
spec:
  selector: "app in (bookinfo, ratings, reviews)"
  ingress:
    - from:
        - selector: app=productpage
      ports:
        - number: 9080

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: bookinfo-auth-policy
spec:
  selector: "app in (bookinfo, ratings, reviews)"
  rules:
    - from:
        - selector: app=productpage
      to:
        selector: "app in (bookinfo, ratings, reviews)"

---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: productpage-auth-policy
spec:
  selector: app=productpage
  rules:
    - from:
        - selector: "app in (bookinfo, ratings, reviews)"
      to:
        selector: app=productpage

---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: Proxy
metadata:
  name: default-proxy
spec:
  selectors:
    - matchLabels:
        - istio-injection: enabled

---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: Injector
metadata:
  name: default-injector
spec:
  selectors:
    - matchLabels:
        - istio-injection: enabled
